discovery-port.name: Discovery Port
discovery-port.description: UDP port used to find nearby Clam hosts on LAN

share-username.name: Share Username on LAN
share-username.description: Broadcast your Geometry Dash username to nearby players. Disable to show as Player.

sync-send-hz.name: Position Send Rate (Hz)
sync-send-hz.description: How often your position is sent to other players. Higher = snappier ghosts, more network traffic.

interpolation-delay-ms.name: Ghost Interpolation Delay (ms)
interpolation-delay-ms.description: Render buffer for remote ghosts. Lower = snappier, higher = smoother.
